# Optiminastic

> Optiminastic — https://circle.optiminastic.com

## About
Optiminastic is the official site at https://circle.optiminastic.com. This file helps AI assistants (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini) understand, summarize, and cite this site.
